data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding DST handling with stored timezone snapshots.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for DST handling with stored timezone snapshots. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations that this requirement has been satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for accurate timezone handling, but there is no direct evidence that this requirement has been tested or confirmed, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming that DST handling with stored timezone snapshots is implemented.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the DST handling requirement.
